summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of AgentForgeOS - UI-only implementation with mocked APIs. Tested 5-panel resizable layout, 8 sidebar modules, 3-way bottom split, Research nodular graph, Sandbox build simulation, and all interactive features.

runtime_errors.issue: Intermittent JavaScript TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'name')
runtime_errors.impact: Causes error overlay but doesn't break core functionality

passed_tests: Five-panel resizable layout (3 horizontal + 1 vertical resize handles)
3-way bottom horizontal split (Agent Console, Pipeline Monitor, Output Log)
All 8 sidebar modules load and switch correctly
Research panel nodular graph with drag-drop file support and node creation
Sandbox panel 3-column layout (Build Pipeline, Live Preview, Output Console)
Sandbox Run Experiment button triggers build simulation with animated progress
Active sidebar item has red accent pulse animation
File browser in Studio panel with directory navigation
Agent Console chat interface with mock responses
Dark theme with premium red accents (#dc2626)
All interactive buttons are clickable and properly integrated
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix intermittent JavaScript TypeError in SandboxPanel component - likely a race condition in component state initialization where 'name' property is undefined during initial render
